headline: AI-Fueled Trio Leads 5 Stocks To Watch Near Buy Points
summary: TJX, Comfort Systems and Equinix are on our stock watchlist this week. Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals and Curtiss-Wright round out the five top stocks to watch. All the five stocks boast strong or solid growth as well as buy points.
